form.formComment: Returns after four months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into seventh after being driven well back, behind Breathe Easy at Geelong over 1609m in a NR up to 45 on December 19 at $126. Draws the inside so can play a role in the finish.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing fourth after showing early speed, behind Midnight Mojo at Melton over 2240m in a NR up to 49 on March 20 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing third behind Inexorable at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 40 to 46 on March 29 at $4. Going well and is a leading player again.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr7) over 1609m at Cranbourne beaten 25 m by Bond Girl (1:58.70) in NR up to 39 on April 3 at $51. Before that, broke in score up and was out of position at the start 10th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Geelong beaten 75 m by Admiralofthefleet (1:57.70) in NR up to 47 on March 13 at $8. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Expecting a return to form.
